examples: A tantalizing aroma of roast beef fills the air.
The tantalizing aroma of fresh coffee wafted towards them.
By a tantalizing quirk of fate, the pair have been drawn to meet in the first round of the championship.
Beyond its musical application, the machine represents tantalizing possibilities for research into disorders that affect speech.
Now comes the tantalizing possibility of combining speed and versatility on a single chip.
